$comment: scripts/PokemonTower6F.asm — the restless MAROWAK ghost at (10,16): without the SILPH SCOPE only the 'Get out' warning; with it the fight (wild_battle unveil — appears as GHOST until the mid-intro reveal). The script keys on wBattleResult == 0: a WIN or a POKé DOLL escape (which never writes it) both lay the ghost — RUN and a loss leave it blocking.

then.text:
The mother's soul
was calmed. It departed to
the afterlife!
